message:
fix(doctor): skip SQLite-specific checks when using Dolt backend

bd doctor was creating beads.db even when using Dolt backend because
several check functions directly called sqlite.New() or sql.Open()
without first checking the configured backend.

Fixed functions:
- CheckStaleClosedIssues: now checks backend, returns early for Dolt
- CheckStaleMolecules: now checks backend, returns early for Dolt
- CheckCompactionCandidates: now checks backend, returns early for Dolt
- CheckHydratedRepoDaemons: now checks backend, returns early for Dolt
- CheckDuplicateIssues: now checks backend, returns early for Dolt
- CheckDatabaseSize: now checks backend, returns early for Dolt

Also fixed fix functions in fix/maintenance.go:
- StaleClosedIssues: checks backend before opening SQLite
- PatrolPollution: checks backend before opening SQLite

Fixes bd-kzgn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
